roa.docketEntryComment: MOTION TO MODIFY CONDITION OF RELEASE FILED
MO FOR FORMAL BAIL HRG AND ORDER REL DEFT ON OR OR BAIL REDUCT FILED
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING, FORTHWITH FROM M12/LD:05-22-20 (GC 60TH)/MO138583/DEF:ADMITTED PROBATION VIOLATION IN CASE #19010130,/CTORD:ACM & EM WITH GPS ARE TERMINATED/SATERM/

/CAL:TO ADD EM/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE ASSET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 05-19-20 IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/ACM/LDPX: 05-22-20 (60TH)/CAUSE1/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THESHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDEREDTO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THESFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXTBUSINESS DAY/WEAP/RX/DTC/WS/X: HOME DETENTION EXCEPT FOR WORK/X:SEE SIGNEDORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:04-14-20/987,2/BAIL 200,000/X  IF DEFENDANT MAKES BAIL HE MUST FOLLOW FILED RELEASE CONDITONS/CTORD: 4011,5 TO ADDRESS THE DEFENDANT'S VIRUS SYMPTONS/SAORD/SA1:PORTIA SHELTON AND KAHMAYLA C,/SAORD2/SAORD/SA2:260 GOLDEN GATE AVE, APT 313,SF/SAORD3/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE, PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:1,5 HOURS/DOP/
/CAL:MOTION TO MODIFY CONDITION/OR/MO GRTD/CONTD: INSTALL EM ON 05-08-20IF DEFENDANT/
